choices.text: Order fields large→small; same-slot tiny types pack. uint128 + uint64 + bool fit one slot (16+8+1=25 bytes). vs. 3 uint256 = 3 slots. 50%+ storage savings.

questions.explanation: Pack same-slot tiny types; large→small order.

choices.text: Bitmap: mapping(uint256 => uint256) claimedBitmap. 256 flags per slot. claimedBitmap[id/256] |= (1 << (id%256)). 256× less storage vs. mapping<uint256,bool>. Standard for airdrop claim tracking.
